_note: v0 eval profiles for HarmonyName naming pipeline. Mix of easy/hard/edge cases. Coordinates use {longitude, timezone} as src/lib/bazi.ts expects. surname=auto for all (default).

profiles.label: easy: balanced spring Wood
profiles.notes: Spring birth, mid-morning. Tends to produce a Balanced or mildly Strong day master with multiple favourable elements — easy case.

profiles.label: easy: autumn balanced
profiles.notes: Autumn afternoon birth. Usually well-supported, broad favourable elements.

profiles.label: easy: summer balanced
profiles.notes: Early summer morning. Typically Balanced/Strong with healthy element spread.

profiles.label: HARD: strong Wood, narrow favourable Metal/Fire/Earth (the case we e2e'd today)
profiles.notes: Strong Wood day master. Favourable: Metal / Fire / Earth (no Water, no Wood). Constrained: many gendered/forbidden chars knock out otherwise-fit candidates. Known stress case for the pipeline.

profiles.label: HARD: weak Water in winter, female
profiles.notes: Deep winter pre-dawn, female. Often a constrained profile — testing whether favourable elements still produce 3 verified names.

profiles.label: HARD: summer Fire day, male
profiles.notes: Peak summer mid-day. Likely Strong Fire; favourables narrow to Water/Metal/Earth. Tests strong-day-master flow.

profiles.label: edge: unknown birthTime (3-pillar)
profiles.notes: Hour pillar dropped → bazi.ts uses 3 pillars + naive noon for date calc. Stress-tests that the pipeline still works without 时柱.

profiles.label: edge: female with strong yang energy (gender-clash potential)
profiles.notes: Female, born noon Beijing in spring (立夏 boundary). Favourables may skew yang (Metal/Fire) → tests whether the gender filter still finds feminine chars.
